title: ModsList
description: Provides a command to view loaded mods
body:
Adds a command to view all your installed mods. 

As of right now, it displays the mods installed on whatever environment it's installed on. The command will ignore fabric's apis, minecraft and the java version.

Initially inspired by Spigot/PaperMC's plugins command. 
##### Accepting feature requests via discord and any bugs caused by the plugin as well.
